description_long: This object is a rectangular wooden bench with a slatted top surface, upon which sits a compact, modern record player. The bench is constructed from medium-toned wood, with four sturdy legs and evenly spaced slats running lengthwise along the top. The record player is small and square, featuring a black body with a prominent green circular detail at its center, likely representing the turntable platter. The record player is positioned centrally on the bench, and its compact design contrasts with the elongated form of the bench. No visible cables or external speakers are attached, and the record player appears to be a standalone unit. The overall appearance is clean and minimalistic, suitable for outdoor or urban park settings.
description: A wooden slatted bench with a compact, black record player featuring a green circular detail placed at its center. The design is minimalistic and modern, blending wood and electronic elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the wooden bench and the centrally placed record player with its green circular detail visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the bench and the record player, with the slatted wood construction clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the bench's length and the record player from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the record player on top, with the green detail visible.
attribute_turntable_platter: Present and centrally located on the record player, the platter is circular with a green color, contrasting against the black body. It appears smooth and flat, occupying most of the top surface of the record player, with no visible grooves or patterns.
